# Meeting — Bi-Weekly "All Hands" Team Meeting
**Date:** May 20, 2026 at 11:50 AM MDT

## Summary
Meeting updates covered contract execution and partnership expansion with performance metrics and technical platform developments.

---

## Key Topics

### Contract and Partnership Updates
Nova Chemicals officially executed their contract — onboarding begins next week. The team expanded their partnership to catalog inventory through deployments in Houston.

### Performance and Strategic Focus
Q1 deal volume increased, yet **average deal sizes decreased significantly**. The team will prioritize deeper integration into client procurement processes for larger inventory projects.

### Platform and AI Development
The AI enrichment tool nears completion to streamline individual part data syncing. New auction platform features aim to improve buyer engagement and internal tracking efficiency.
